changes_from_t11: Wider safety margins (≤8 small-table, 5 extras, primary-table bonus, min 4 cols)
Over-compaction guards (reject >80% reduction, <300 chars on large schemas)
Re-widen retry before full-schema fallback (extras 5→8, min cols 4→5)

example_before_after.question: How many shipments with weight of no more than 1,000 pounds were shipped by the oldest truck?
example_before_after.full_schema_snippet:
CREATE TABLE city
(
    city_id    INTEGER
            primary key,
    city_name  TEXT,
    state      TEXT,
    population INTEGER,
    area       REAL
);
CREATE TABLE customer
(
    cust_id        INTEGER
            primary key,
    cust_name      TEXT,
    annual_revenue INTEGER,
    cust_type      TEXT,
    address        TEXT,
    city           TEXT,
    state          TEXT,
    zip            REAL,
    phone          TEXT
);

            prima...
example_before_after.compact_schema_snippet:
CREATE TABLE truck
(
    truck_id INTEGER primary key,
    make TEXT,
    model_year INTEGER
);
CREATE TABLE shipment
(
    ship_id INTEGER primary key,
    cust_id INTEGER,
    weight REAL,
    truck_id INTEGER,
    driver_id INTEGER,
    city_id INTEGER,
    ship_date TEXT,
    foreign key (truck_id) references truck(truck_id)
);
example_before_after.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM truck AS T1 INNER JOIN shipment AS T2 ON T1.truck_id = T2.truck_id WHERE T2.weight < 1000 ORDER BY T1.model_year ASC LIMIT 1
